# First Chapter {#sec-chapter1}

The first substantive chapter of Part One. Body text goes here.

## A section

Section body. Equations render via LaTeX:

$$
y = X\beta + \varepsilon
$$ {#eq-linear}

with @eq-linear used inline for cross-references.

## A second section

::: {.callout-note}
Use Quarto callouts (note, warning, tip, important, caution) for asides.
:::

Citations go in BibTeX form: @example2025.
